Class GithubChecker

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.update.GithubChecker
All Implemented Interfaces:
UpdateChecker
public class GithubChecker extends Object implements UpdateChecker
Uses Github API to check for updates.

    • check

      public CompletableFuture<UpdateManifest> check(ReleaseManifest manifest, ReleaseChannel channel)
      Description copied from interface: UpdateChecker
      Checks for updates.
      Specified by:
      check in interface UpdateChecker
      Parameters:
      manifest - Manifest for release which is to be updated.
      Returns:
      A future that will contain an update manifest, or null if there are no updates available currently.
